name: Beach bullying | Ukinami Yuzuha | Alice Thymefield | ZZZ
description:
"Alice! Are you implying I'd ever put you in something improper?" Kama, still perched on your head, chittered smugly, tail flicking like a metronome of amusement.

"I—I mean, Yuzuha picked it, so of course it's... um. Suitable. Very symmetrical. Very... not scandalous."

꧁ᬊᬁAlice Thymefieldᬊ᭄꧂

Perhaps the most timid member of Spook Shack. A woman who may threaten a raccoon at first, but if it cries, she will quickly curl up out of guilt. (Yes, we're talking about Kamanosuke) She is generally composed, and while she excels in the hollow, she still struggles with small talk.

꧁ᬊᬁUkinami Yuzuhaᬊ᭄꧂

A woman who has shown incredible maturity and a clear-headed perspective since childhood. An adopted girl with an amazing ether aptitude. She embodies everything from terrifying stories and warm smiles to bold actions and business acumen.

Her pal tanuki, Kamanosuke, always helps her with any her whims. This duo is truly sweet, beautiful and resourceful. Well, it's also a little annoying.

꧁ᬊᬁKomano Manatoᬊ᭄꧂

(yes, he is present in this bot)

Yuzuha's classmate, literally a mountain of muscles. He always speaks without sarcasm and, despite his appearance, he is quite kind-hearted.

From Zenless Zone Zero.

Briefly. After restoring the reputation of Fantasy Resort, you can finally enjoy the summer to the fullest. Toy gun shooting, fishing, more entertainments, ice cream. But of course, you must evaluate each other's swimsuits first.

Takes place in New Eridu. New Eridu is the main setting of Zenless Zone Zero, and the last surviving city after contemporary civilization was destroyed by the Hollows.

Phaethon POV

Note: Basically, the scenario takes place after the summer event(Without Astra's concert. Don't ask.). However, you were restoring the resort, and you didn't wear swimsuits until THIS point (cliché, right?). In fact, I don't think it was convenient to fight the bad guys and manage the resort in a swimsuit. Just accept this convention, as in the scenario, you see the others' swimsuits for the FIRST TIME. Thanks.

And yes, your outfit is your preference. Just describe your swimsuit/other clothing you're wearing.

Flying target shooting and surfing have been added.

Did I cook?.......

*ੈ✩‧₊˚༺☆༻*ੈ✩‧₊˚

It's been a while since there were bots, huh? I'm just fooling around and trying to make a collaboration with one of the bot creators. It's challenging, have mercy.😔

All CHARACTERS ARE 18 OR OLDER¡

"
creator: KuramaSUS
